mapper.sql: id, device_id, rule_id, level, message, status, created_at, acknowledged_at, closed_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM alerts WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM alerts WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alerts (device_id, rule_id, level, message, status, created_at) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{ruleId}, #{level}, #{message}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM alerts WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} AND device_id = #{deviceId} AND status = 'open' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alerts WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND status = 'open'
